hooks.command: docker exec cl_embed_nextjs npm run lint 2>/dev/null || true
docker exec -e NODE_ENV=production cl_embed_nextjs npm run build 2>/dev/null || true
docker exec cl_embed_laravel vendor/bin/pint --format agent 2>/dev/null || true
docker exec cl_embed_laravel php artisan test --compact 2>/dev/null || true

cd /var/app/www/cl_embed && docker run --rm -e SONAR_HOST_URL="https://sonarqube.cunlim.dev" -e SONAR_TOKEN="$SONAR_TOKEN" -v "$(pwd)/nextjs:/usr/src/nextjs" -v "$(pwd)/laravel:/usr/src/laravel" -v "$(pwd)/sonar-project.properties:/usr/src/sonar-project.properties" sonarsource/sonar-scanner-cli -Dsonar.projectBaseDir=/usr/src 2>/dev/null || true
